title: stipa kirghisorum var. ikonnikovii
intro: Stipa kirghisorum var. ikonnikovii, also known as the Ikonnikov's needle grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Stipa kirghisorum var. ikonnikovii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
